name: Treasure Checklist
description: Do you have the icon that you wanted?

group-chests.name: Group Tier II Rewards
group-chests.description: Rewards from <cg>Tier II Chests</c> (25, 50 and 100 Keys) are grouped together.

sorted-rewards.name: Sort Golden Key rewards
sorted-rewards.description: Displays the rewards from <cy>Golden Key Chests</c> in their settled order.

garage-button.name: Icon Kit Button
garage-button.description: Whenever you want the button of the mod inside the <cy>Icon Kit</c>.

room-button.name: Treasure Room Button
room-button.description: Whenever you want the button of the mod at the bottom left corner of <cy>The Treasure Room</c>.

wraith-page.name: Wraith's Rewards
wraith-page.description:
Adds an extra page with the icons you can get from <cp>the Wraith</c>.
***
<cc>Technically the Wraith isn't part of the Treasure room, but it's added here to make things easier</c>.

wraith-codes.name: Spoil Codes
wraith-codes.description:
Displays the code to obtain the icons from <cp>the Wraith</c>.
***
<cc>The mod fetches the codes online, only when this feature is enabled. You're free to disable this feature if used offline</c>.

issues.info: If you got any Bugs or Issues with the mod, please report it through the Github
